holdings.infoBox: LSAF is an equity ETF with a total of 100 individual holdings. The top holdings are Western Digital stock at 2.27%, Dell Technologies at 2.23%, ON Semiconductor at 1.73%, Cash & Cash Equivalents at 1.71%, and TD SYNNEX at 1.53%.

overview.description: The LeaderShares AlphaFactor US Core Equity ETF (LSAF) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the AlphaFactor U.S. Core Equity index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of US stocks selected by multiple fundamental factors. LSAF was launched on Oct 2, 2018 and is issued by Redwood.
